```latex
\[
\nabla_{\theta} J(\theta) \approx \frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^{N} (R(\boldsymbol{\tau}^i) - b^i(s)) \nabla_{\theta} \log p_{\theta}(\boldsymbol{\tau}^i | s)
\]
```

This will render the equation as shown in the image.
